name: Azure Key Vault PAM Provider
description: The Azure Key Vault PAM Provider allows for the retrieval of stored credentials from an Azure Key Vault secret. A valid Key Vault URL is required. Currently in dev, a work in progress,

Parameters.Name: KeyVaultUri
Parameters.Description: URI for your Azure Key Vault

Parameters.Name: AuthorityHost
Parameters.Description: Authority host of your Azure infrastructure

Parameters.Name: SecretId
Parameters.Description: Name of your secret in Azure Key Vault

Parameters.Name: KeyVaultUri
Parameters.Description: URI for your Azure Key Vault

Parameters.Name: AuthorityHost
Parameters.Description: Authority host of your Azure infrastructure

Parameters.Name: TenantId
Parameters.Description: Tenant or directory ID in Azure

Parameters.Name: ClientId
Parameters.Description: Application ID in Microsoft Entra ID

Parameters.Name: ClientSecret
Parameters.Description: Client secret for your application ID

Parameters.Name: SecretId
Parameters.Description: Name of your secret in Azure Key Vault
